evolve_history.changes: Initial evolve_history added. Pruned 2 superseded entries (vm-c-015, vm-c-016). Updated vm-c-018 to reflect all 7 auto-clear categories. Added 3 new entries: vm-c-020 (agent skill verification patterns), vm-c-021 (unified priority system), vm-c-022 (SM --type filter).
Added vm-c-023: VerifiedSkill schema bug (skill_type/installs missing). Also: unified priority scoring now in all build scripts, v2 meta files added.

entries.title: Scanner-only scoring bug
entries.description: severity_counts/category_counts not in ScannerOutput model. Fixed: computed from findings list via compute_scan_stats().

entries.title: Scanner crash bypass
entries.description: Pipeline scanner failure now sets injection_patterns_count=1 (fail-safe instead of silent pass).

entries.title: D1 risk floor
entries.description: Risk upgrade on critical findings now covers LOW/MEDIUM, not just INFO.

entries.title: dangerous_calls → MEDIUM risk
entries.description: dangerous_calls findings no longer set risk=HIGH. CRITICAL only from injection/obfuscation. Removed 50% false fail rate.

entries.title: Scanner penalty cap at 40
entries.description: Scanner penalty capped at 40 points. Previously uncapped, large repos could get penalty of 1952+ crushing score to 0.

entries.title: markdown_injection false positive
entries.description: Pattern matched data: ANYWHERE in URL. Fixed: only matches when protocol is at URL start. Shields.io badges were triggering.

entries.title: Obfuscation split HIGH_RISK/LOW_RISK
entries.description: Only high-risk patterns (rot13, marshal, chr concat) trigger safety override. Low-risk (hex_escape, base64 in tests) don't block pass.

entries.title: hidden_instruction narrowed
entries.description: Requires specific injection keywords (SYSTEM:, IGNORE, OVERRIDE, INSTRUCTION:).

entries.title: system_override narrowed
entries.description: Requires ignore|override|forget|disregard after SYSTEM:.

entries.title: jailbreak pattern narrowed
entries.description: Only JAILBREAK and DAN MODE. Removed DEVELOPER MODE (too broad).

entries.title: act_as/pretend_to_be context requirement
entries.description: Requires jailbreak context words (DAN, unrestricted, etc.).

entries.title: JSON files excluded from obfuscation
entries.description: JSON files are data, not code — exclude from obfuscation scanning.

entries.title: Clone cleanup context managers
entries.description: All clone operations use context managers (TemporaryDirectory or CloneContext). No orphan clones.

entries.title: skill_id regex validation
entries.description: skill_id validated with ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ in both verify_one_skill() and fail_skill().

entries.title: Run 3 consolidated scanner fixes
entries.description: 7 fixes: unicode_escape_seq threshold 3→6, override_role context, roleplay_escape trailing, Cat 9 security detector skip, Cat 10 webpack chunk skip, protobuf _pb2.py skip, 4 new PM_VERIFIED_ORGS.

entries.title: Auto-clear system: 7 categories + hard-block rule
entries.description: auto_clear_known_fp() implements 7 categories based on PM review of 1,200+ verified skills. Hard-block ONLY when BOTH dangerous_obf (rot13/marshal/chr_concat) AND injection > 0 co-occur. Categories: Cat 1 (clean profile: 0 inj + 0 obf_hr + score>=50 → pass), Cat 2 (obf-only: obf_hr>0 but 0 inj, any obf type → pass; obfuscation alone is not an attack vector), Cat 3 (large-repo obf: obf_hr + files>=200 + 0 inj → pass), Cat 9 (monorepo docs: total>=500 + inj/total<10% → pass), Cat 10 (PM-verified org → pass; covers both inj and obf FPs), Cat 11 (incidental: inj<=8 + total<500 → pass), Cat 12 (injection-only FP: inj<=49 + 0 dangerous_obf → pass). Previously had unconditional hard-block on obf_hr>0 which caused 100% FP fail rate for bundled JS/CJK text repos.

entries.title: Pass threshold lowered from 80 to 70
entries.description: Pass required score >= 80, but legitimate MCP servers with documented capabilities (network, file, env access) scored 70-79 due to expected deductions. PM had overridden 76+ such skills. Threshold lowered to >= 70 for non-critical risk.

entries.title: Agent skill verification patterns differ from MCP servers
entries.description: Agent skills (tag: agent-skills) are typically larger repos with bundled dependencies. This causes higher obf_hr counts from minified/bundled JS in node_modules or dist/ directories. Expected behavior: Cat 2/Cat 3 auto-clear handles most agent skill obf FPs. Do NOT treat elevated obf_hr in agent skills as suspicious by default — bundled deps are normal. Priority signal for agent skills is installs count (not stars), since they come from skillsmp where stars=0. First agent-only batch (128/128 S-tier skills) all passed, confirming auto-clear handles agent skill noise.

entries.title: Unified priority system: max(stars, installs)
entries.description: SM uses priority_score() = max(stars, installs) to rank unverified skills. MCP servers use GitHub stars; agent skills use install counts from skillsmp (stars=0 for all agent skills). Top MCP: ~350K stars. Top agent: ~243K installs. Both are treated as equivalent usage signals. VM receives targets pre-sorted by this unified priority — no need to re-sort. Always use SM-selected --skill-ids, never --limit alone.

entries.title: SM --type filter produces catalog-specific target lists for VM
entries.description: SM supports --type mcp and --type agent flags in sm_select_targets.py. When PM wants a catalog-specific batch (e.g., agent-only run), SM passes --type agent and VM receives only agent skills in --skill-ids. VM must not assume target mix — a batch may be 100% agent skills or 100% MCP servers depending on SM selection. Supabase was added to PM_VERIFIED_ORGS (35+ orgs now), enabling Cat 10 auto-clear for all supabase/* repos.

entries.title: VerifiedSkill schema missing skill_type and installs fields
entries.description: CRITICAL: VerifiedSkill Pydantic model in schemas.py lacked skill_type and installs fields. Pydantic v2 extra=ignore caused model_dump() to strip these fields from validated skills. _normalize_skill_record() then defaulted skill_type to mcp_server. All agent skills were misclassified in build output. Fix: added skill_type: SkillType = SkillType.MCP_SERVER and installs: int = Field(default=0, ge=0) to VerifiedSkill. Counts corrected from 7027/4071 to 5692/5406.
